name: Microscopy Time-Lapse Formatting
description: Process the 'Mitosis' sample dataset into a presentation-ready video format. Perform a Maximum Intensity Z-Projection on the 5D hyperstack and isolate the Red channel (Channel 1, Chromatin). Create a sub-stack containing only the first 20 timepoints and add a timestamp starting at 00:00 with a 15.00-second interval in the top-left corner (font size 20-25). Save the final TIFF stack to ~/ImageJ_Data/processed/mitosis_movie_formatted.tif.
